---
title: "Stack"
description: >-
  Computational biology and software engineering: omics analysis, sequencing
  technologies, programming, machine learning, databases and infrastructure.
toc: true
---

::: {.lead .reveal}
The tools I work with, and the methods I use them for.
:::

## Computational biology

```{=html}
<!-- Written as raw HTML on purpose. Pandoc merges consecutive bracketed spans
     into a single paragraph, which left .spec-row with one child instead of
     two and collapsed the grid. Explicit divs guarantee the label and value
     are separate grid items. -->
<dl class="spec reveal">

  <div class="spec-row">
    <dt class="spec-label">Omics analysis</dt>
    <dd class="spec-value">
      <span class="s-item">Genomics</span>
      <span class="s-item">Transcriptomics</span>
      <span class="s-item">RNA biology: <span class="s-sub">isoforms, polyadenylation, APA sites, modifications, splicing</span></span>
      <span class="s-item">Phylogenetic analyses</span>
      <span class="s-item">Variant calling</span>
    </dd>
  </div>

  <div class="spec-row">
    <dt class="spec-label">Sequencing technologies</dt>
    <dd class="spec-value">
      <span class="s-item">Illumina</span>
      <span class="s-item">Oxford Nanopore</span>
      <span class="s-item">PacBio</span>
    </dd>
  </div>

</dl>
```

## Software engineering & DevOps

```{=html}
<dl class="spec reveal">

  <div class="spec-row">
    <dt class="spec-label">Programming</dt>
    <dd class="spec-value">
      <span class="s-item">R: <span class="s-sub">tidyverse, data.table, Bioconductor</span></span>
      <span class="s-item">Python: <span class="s-sub">pandas, SciPy, scikit-learn, Keras, TensorFlow/PyTorch</span></span>
      <span class="s-item">Bash</span>
    </dd>
  </div>

  <div class="spec-row">
    <dt class="spec-label">Machine learning</dt>
    <dd class="spec-value">
      <span class="s-item">Predictive modelling</span>
      <span class="s-item">Deep learning</span>
      <span class="s-item">Model development, validation and deployment for biology</span>
    </dd>
  </div>

  <div class="spec-row">
    <dt class="spec-label">Data visualisation &amp; reporting</dt>
    <dd class="spec-value">
      <span class="s-item">Interactive dashboards and graphics: <span class="s-sub">ggplot2, shiny, plotly, rmarkdown, streamlit</span></span>
    </dd>
  </div>

  <div class="spec-row">
    <dt class="spec-label">Software development</dt>
    <dd class="spec-value">
      <span class="s-item">Creator of and contributor to openly available bioinformatic tools</span>
      <span class="s-item s-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB/ninetails">ninetails</a>,
        <a href="https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB">nanotail2</a>,
        <a href="https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB/NanoQuRe">NanoQuRe</a>,
        <a href="https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB/rDNA_mine">rDNAmine</a>
      </span>
    </dd>
  </div>

  <div class="spec-row">
    <dt class="spec-label">Databases</dt>
    <dd class="spec-value">
      <span class="s-item">SQL: <span class="s-sub">MySQL, PostgreSQL</span></span>
    </dd>
  </div>

  <div class="spec-row">
    <dt class="spec-label">Infrastructure</dt>
    <dd class="spec-value">
      <span class="s-item">Docker</span>
      <span class="s-item">Kubernetes</span>
      <span class="s-item">Cloud platforms: <span class="s-sub">Azure</span></span>
    </dd>
  </div>

  <div class="spec-row">
    <dt class="spec-label">Best practices</dt>
    <dd class="spec-value">
      <span class="s-item">Version control: <span class="s-sub">Git</span></span>
      <span class="s-item">Reproducible research</span>
    </dd>
  </div>

</dl>
```

::: {.btn-row}
<a class="btn-cta" href="software.qmd"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i> See it applied</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="publications/index.qmd"><i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i> Publications</a>
:::
